svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(24, 34, 46), rgb(201, 210, 220)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(24, 34, 46), rgb(201, 210, 220));
